caption: The video captures a live performance in a small auditorium or conference room, where an audience is seated facing the stage. On the left side of the stage, an older man with gray hair and glasses is seated at a podium, possibly reading or speaking. On the right side, a younger man with long dark hair tied back is playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. The audience appears engaged, with some members leaning forward slightly, indicating their interest in the performance. The setting has wooden paneling on the walls, giving it a warm and intimate atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, suggesting that this event may be associated with an organization or venue by that name. The overall mood of the video is one of quiet appreciation and focus on the musical and spoken word performances.
